tasks.label: Upload CDH
tasks.command: cmake -S . -B build/cdh -G Ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake -DNODE_TYPE=NODE_CDH && cmake --build build/cdh && dfu-util -a 0 -s 0x08000000:leave -D build/cdh/cubesat-flatsat-sandbox.bin

tasks.label: Upload EPS
tasks.command: cmake -S . -B build/eps -G Ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake -DNODE_TYPE=NODE_EPS && cmake --build build/eps && dfu-util -a 0 -s 0x08000000:leave -D build/eps/cubesat-flatsat-sandbox.bin
